calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Bonanno for Thomas Walsh (Executor).

Mr. Bonanno provided history, explained circumstances, disbursements made, that there is a "back stop clause/provision" in the Trust to provide for contingency of a poor over will if for some reason the Trust is not accepted, that there already was a living trust created, the reason why there is a provision of the Trust creating a Trust for Raymond, that the venue for the Kyle Trust is in Alameda County, provisions of the Trust regarding Trustees, and addressed other issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes. The accounting petition was taken under submission pending receipt of a declaration from Mr. Bonanno regarding provisions of the Trust as to who is to be Trustee of the Trust.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Clarke. (Not Reported)
